case_title: KATZ, ROSIE vs. ABATTE, G. VITTORIA DBA TRAVEL CONNECTION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATZ, ROSIE AS TO DEFENDANT ABATTE, G. VITTORIA DBA TRAVEL CONNECTION SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATZ, ROSIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABATTE, G. VITTORIA DBA TRAVEL CONNECTION $1,880.58 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,969.58
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATZ, ROSIE AS TO DEFENDANT ABATTE, G. VITTORIA DBA TRAVEL CONNECTION
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF KATZ, ROSIE
